corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: visible hover drops attached object pronoun كَ and uses lemma-style infinitive
drill_prompt: Mark the host and attached suffix pronoun, then write what each piece contributes. Token: يَسْأَلُكَ.
learner_explanation: The suffix is a real grammatical piece of the written token; the hover must either show it or stay pending.
nahw_lesson: A following explicit subject or surrounding phrase does not erase an attached object or possessive pronoun.
sarf_lesson: Segment the host and suffix pronoun before choosing an English hover.
what_failed: A composed token hover omitted an attached suffix pronoun. Source row says: visible hover drops attached object pronoun كَ and uses lemma-style infinitive
